ddls:
CREATE TABLE "structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each structure */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the structure (e.g., County/Municipality) */,
  "maintenance_authority" TEXT /* Authority responsible for maintenance */,
  "route" INTEGER /* Route number of the structure */,
  "structure_number" TEXT /* Structure number (e.g., 100FC80) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the structure */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "sufficiency_rating" REAL /* Sufficiency rating of the structure (out of 100) */,
  "interim_inspection_required" INTEGER /* Whether an interim inspection is required */,
  "priority_rank" TEXT /* Priority rank of the structure (e.g., NR, Low, Medium, High) */,
  "structure_type" TEXT /* Type of the structure (e.g., Bridge, Roadway) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the structure in meters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the structure in meters */,
  "construction_date" TEXT /* Date of construction */,
  "last_rehabilitation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last major rehabilitation */,
  "material" TEXT /* Main construction material */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Average daily traffic volume */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) */,
  "condition_rating" REAL /* Current condition rating */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structures_maintenance_authority FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_authority") REFERENCES maintenance_authorities ("authority_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structures_priority_rank FOREIGN KEY ("priority_rank") REFERENCES priority_ranks ("rank_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structures_owner FOREIGN KEY ("owner") REFERENCES owners ("owner_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structures_sufficiency_rating FOREIGN KEY ("sufficiency_rating") REFERENCES sufficiency_ratings ("rating_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the structure being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments from the inspection */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., Completed, In Progress, Scheduled) */,
  "inspection_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the inspection */,
  "defects_identified" TEXT /* A list of identified defects */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Actions recommended by the inspector */,
  "inspection_duration" REAL /* Duration of the inspection in hours */,
  "inspection_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used during the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_name FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_name") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the structure being maintained */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity (e.g., repair, replacement) */,
  "activity_notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments from the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., Completed, In Progress, Scheduled) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance activity */,
  "materials_used" TEXT /* Materials used during the maintenance */,
  "labor_hours" REAL /* Number of labor hours spent */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the maintenance */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_activities_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES structures ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_activities_activity_type FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "structural_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each structural assessment */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the structure being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the structural assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of structural assessment (e.g., visual, analytical) */,
  "assessment_notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments from the structural assessment */,
  "assessment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assessment (e.g., Completed, In Progress, Scheduled) */,
  "assessment_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the assessment */,
  "defects_identified" TEXT /* A list of identified defects */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Actions recommended by the assessor */,
  "assessment_duration" REAL /* Duration of the assessment in hours */,
  "assessment_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used during the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structural_assessments_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Type of owner (e.g., County, Municipality) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Primary contact person for the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance authority */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance authority */,
  "authority_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance authority (e.g., Local, State) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Primary contact person for the authority */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "inspector_certification" TEXT /* Certification of the inspector (e.g., PE, CE) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Inspector, Maintenance Personnel, Engineer) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priority_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority rank (e.g., NR, Low, Medium, High) */,
  "rank_description" TEXT /* Description of the priority rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sufficiency_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sufficiency rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the sufficiency rating (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "rating_description" TEXT /* Description of the sufficiency rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type (e.g., Repair, Replacement) */,
  "activity_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)
